title: Player Capacity
description: Choose how many players can join your pool.
comingSoonDesc: Payment methods will be enabled soon.
corporateAprilNotice: The platform will be 100% ready on April 1st. You can create your pool now and we'll notify you on April 1st to complete the payment.
customFreeCovered: The free plan already covers up to {limit} players.
customInList: That number is already covered in the list above.
customResult: For {requested} players, the smallest plan that covers you is {offered} players.
customReason: You need {requested}, and plans come in blocks of {increment}. The {offered}-player plan is the smallest that covers your need.
poolFull: This pool has reached its maximum capacity.
